zh.lifeSummary: Mary Weston於1426年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾 諾斯 利丁克利夫蘭。她於1450年之前與Thomas Eaglesfield在英國英格蘭倫敦結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1518年1月8日在英國英格蘭希迪 本 倫敦享年92歲，埋葬在英國米德萊可斯特普尼。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mary Weston于1426年出生在英国英格兰越可爾 諾斯 利丁克利夫蘭。她于1450年之前与Thomas Eaglesfield在英国英格兰倫敦结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1518年1月8日在英国英格兰希迪 本 倫敦享年92岁，埋葬在英国米德萊可斯特普尼。

nameMeanings.name: Weston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from any of numerous places called Weston, from Old English west ‘west’ + tūn ‘farmstead, settlement’.

topographic name from Middle English atte west tun(e) ‘at the west farmstead, settlement’ (Old English west + tūn), or from Middle English (bi) weste(n)tune (Old English be westan tūne or be west in tūne), denoting someone who lived either to the west of a settlement or in the western part of a settlement. The latter was a common surname in Sussex.

variants.name: Wesson
meanings: English (Midlands and Kent): variant of   Weston  .
History: John Wesson came from England to Salem, MA, in 1644.

variants.name: Moira
meanings: Anglicized form of Irish Máire , now used throughout the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: Mary Weston was born in 1426, in Cleveland, Yorkshire North Riding, England, United Kingdom. She married Thomas Eaglesfield before 1450, in London, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died on 8 January 1518, in City of London, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 92, and was buried in Stepney, Middlesex, England.

fr.Cleveland, Yorkshire North Riding, Engla: Cleveland, Yorkshire North Riding, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Mary Weston est née en 1426, à Cleveland, Yorkshire North Riding, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé Thomas Eaglesfield avant 1450, à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 8 janvier 1518, à City of London, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 92 ans, et a été enterrée à Stepney, Middlesex, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Westonは1426年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイア ノース リディングクレベランドで生まれた。1450年以前にイギリスイギリスロンドンでThomas Eaglesfieldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1518年1月8日にイギリスイギリスシトイ オフ ロンドンで92歳で死去し，イギリスミッドレセックスステプニーにて埋葬された。

ko.Cleveland, Yorkshire North Riding, Engla: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 노르스 리딩 클레벨랜드
ko.lifeSummary: Mary Weston(은)는 1426년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 노르스 리딩 클레벨랜드에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1450년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 런던에서 Thomas Eaglesfield(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1518년 1월 8일 영국 잉글랜드 시티 프 런던에서 92세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 스테p니에 묻혔다.

ru.Cleveland, Yorkshire North Riding, Engla: кливеланд, еркшир норт ридинг, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Mary Weston родилась в 1426 г. в местности кливеланд, еркшир норт ридинг, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Eaglesfield перед 1450 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла 8 января 1518 г. в местности сити оф лондон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 92 лет и была похоронена в местности степни, миддлесекс, Англия.
